title: RBI (NBFCs – Registration, Exemptions & Framework for Scale Based Regulation) Amendment Directions, 2026
description:
RBI classified NBFCs into Type I and Type II categories based on public fund usage and customer interface. The amendment ensures targeted regulation and reduces compliance burden for low-risk entities.
The post RBI (NBFCs – Registration, Exemptions & Framework for Scale Based Regulation) Amendment Directions, 2026 appeared first on TaxGuru.
